x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Employee sentiment on HR cases provides the wellbeing signal Now Assist HRSD uses for proactive AI escalation and empathetic response generation. Missing sentiment data limits AI empathy capabilities.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Enable sentiment scoring on HR cases via the HRSD sentiment configuration. Train HR agents to capture feedback. Now Assist HRSD uses sentiment signals for AI-driven empathetic responses and proactive escalation.
